evaluation_contract_supplement.permitted_use: gate identifiers and thresholds only; observed values and pass columns are forbidden implementation inputs
evaluation_contract_supplement.resolution: the 23-gate labels apply lower-bound gates to all three comparators in validation and holdout; the packet prose named only the static comparator

source_data.session_policy: sorted intersection of dates present for all seven frozen symbols
source_data.non_common_rows: excluded and counted in the result
source_data.pit_limitation: no accepted immutable available_at, qfq revision lineage, or primary exchange calendar identity

class_mapping_resolution: mechanical name/class mapping selected before opening outcomes; it is not evidence that the legacy implementation used identical identifiers

signal.decision_frequency: last common local session in each calendar month
signal.absolute_filter: risky momentum > 0 and risky momentum > cash-like momentum
signal.ranking: momentum descending; exact ties use frozen risky class order
signal.volatility_formula: sample standard deviation ddof=1 of 60 close-to-close common-session returns ending at the decision close
signal.inverse_volatility: normalize inverse volatility across selected risky assets, clip each raw weight directly at 0.6 without redistributing, assign remainder to cash-like

execution_accounting.evaluation_initial_close: first common session on or after 2019-01-01
execution_accounting.return_ledger_start: the following common session; retain pre-2019 history for signal warm-up, discard generated targets with execution_date on or before the evaluation initial close, and hold 100% cash-like until the first retained target execution
execution_accounting.initial_state: 100% cash-like ETF at the evaluation initial close
execution_accounting.daily_factor_order: old holdings overnight return, open rebalance cost, new holdings intraday return
execution_accounting.between_rebalances: no trade; holdings drift with prices
execution_accounting.turnover: full L1 sum of absolute target-minus-open-drifted weights across all seven assets
execution_accounting.initial_rebalance_cost: included under the same full-L1 rule
execution_accounting.missing_common_session_row: date excluded by the frozen intersection and counted

comparator_execution: same monthly decision/execution schedule and cost convention as the strategy
complete_month_rule: a calendar month counts only when every common-session date in that month is represented in the aligned daily return ledger

metrics.net_annualized_return: geometric product of daily net factors raised to 252/N minus 1
metrics.maximum_drawdown: minimum daily close wealth divided by prior running peak minus 1, with split wealth reset to 1
metrics.daily_excess: strategy daily arithmetic net return minus comparator daily arithmetic net return

inference.resampling: chronological circular blocks; concatenate and truncate to N
inference.null_centering: subtract observed sample mean before resampling
inference.one_sided_p_value: (1 + count(centered bootstrap mean >= observed uncentered mean)) / (draws + 1)
inference.lower_bound: observed mean minus linear quantile(centered bootstrap means, 1-one_sided_alpha)
inference.bh_families: three comparator excess tests separately within validation and holdout
inference.bh_order: raw p ascending; ties by comparator order
inference.bh_adjusted_p: reverse cumulative minimum of min(1, raw_p * 3 / rank)
inference.mechanical_supplement: unfrozen bootstrap mechanics use the existing V2 strict convention and are not claimed legacy equivalence

families.scope: all three comparator excess series in validation and holdout
all three comparator excess series in validation and holdout

known_limitations: the source is a retrospective qfq snapshot without accepted available_at or revision lineage
the interval labeled forward_2026h1 was already historical before this clean-room replay
common-session intersection silently changes neither prices nor parameters but excludes non-common rows and is recorded
the exact class-symbol mapping and several accounting and inference mechanics were not frozen in the source packet and are clean-room mechanical resolutions
a result can only preserve or strengthen the rejected migration evidence; it cannot rescue Family67

output.default_mode: validate definition only; no source read and no file write
output.execute_requires: clean committed worktree and exact source commit
